## ✅ Checklist

Before submitting this bug report:

* [ ] I searched existing issues.
* [ ] I am using the latest version.
* [ ] I included steps to reproduce the issue.
* [ ] I attached screenshots or logs (if available).
* [ ] I verified the issue is reproducible.

---

Thank you for taking the time to report this issue! Your feedback helps improve the **Shop Billing System**.
